name: Ram
description: While a unit makes an attack with an Attack Pool that has the Ram X keyword, during the Modify Attack Dice step, it may change X results to b results if it meets either of the following conditions: • The unit leader has a notched base and the unit made at least 1 full Standard Move at its Speed during the same Activation as an attack using Ram X. • The unit leader has an unnotched base and the unit made at least 1 Move during the same Activation as an attack using Ram X.
official_rules_text: While a unit makes an attack with an Attack Pool that has the Ram X keyword, during the Modify Attack Dice step, it may change X results to b results if it meets either of the following conditions: • The unit leader has a notched base and the unit made at least 1 full Standard Move at its Speed during the same Activation as an attack using Ram X. • The unit leader has an unnotched base and the unit made at least 1 Move during the same Activation as an attack using Ram X.
